sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: VIAVI Solutions Inc (NASDAQ:VIAV) Beats Q2 Earnings, Soars on Strong Q3 Revenue Guidance
feed.summary: VIAVI Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ:VIAV) reported strong fiscal second-quarter 2026 results, with earnings per share exceeding expectations despite revenue slightly missing the consensus. The market reacted positively, and the stock rose significantly after hours, driven by robust third-quarter revenue guidance that surpassed analyst estimates. This performance underscores management's confidence in the company's network testing and optical security segments.

feed.title: Clarivate (CLVT) Reveals New AI Academic Assistant, To Launch in Q3 2026
feed.summary: Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT) has announced Clarivate Nexus, an AI-powered academic assistant designed to integrate library content and services with AI tools used by students and researchers. This new tool, part of Clarivate's expanding academic AI services, will be released for early access in Q3 2026, initially as a browser extension before direct integration into campus systems. The company also recently signed a multi-year agreement with Iran’s Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research.

feed.title: Dow to cut about 4,500 jobs as emphasis shifts to AI and automation
feed.summary: Dow is planning to cut approximately 4,500 jobs and anticipates $600 million to $800 million in severance costs as it shifts its emphasis to artificial intelligence and automation. This move is part of a broader plan to simplify operations and streamline the business. The job cuts follow similar actions by other major companies like Amazon, UPS, and Pinterest, reflecting a trend of increased AI adoption and economic uncertainty leading to workforce reductions.

feed.title: Analysts split on Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) valuation despite strong operating momentum
feed.summary: This article discusses the split analyst opinions on Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) valuation. Despite strong operational performance, analysts are divided on whether its stock is a "buy" or "hold." This indicates a strong operational performance coupled with market uncertainty about its current valuation.

feed.title: Iqvia (IQV) Partners with Boehringer Ingelheim for Data Transfor
feed.summary: Iqvia (IQV) has announced a long-term strategic partnership with Boehringer Ingelheim to enhance the latter's global commercial data strategy using Iqvia's data-as-a-service technology. This collaboration aims to improve data harmonization and transformation across various therapeutic areas and regions for Boehringer Ingelheim. Despite strong financial performance characterized by revenue growth and expanding operating margins, Iqvia faces challenges such as high leverage, potential liquidity constraints, and its ROIC falling below WACC.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Raises Stake in Ecolab Inc. $ECL
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its holdings in Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) by 170.2% in the third quarter, bringing their total stake to 8,090 shares valued at $2,216,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Ecolab, which reported strong quarterly earnings aligning with analyst estimates. Ecolab recently raised its quarterly dividend and has an average "Moderate Buy" rating from Wall Street analysts.

feed.title: PSEG Recycled More Than 86% of Its Generated Materials
feed.summary: PSEG announced that it recycled over 86% of the materials it generated in 2024, diverting waste from landfills through initiatives like repurposing wetland mats and wooden pallets. This effort supports community partners such as America's Grow-a-Row. The company emphasizes a "Reduce. Reuse. Recycle. Reinvest" philosophy as part of its commitment to sustainability and community support.

feed.title: Altria Stock Drops After Earnings. It’s Losing the Smokeless Tobacco Race.
feed.summary: Altria Group stock fell on Thursday after the company, known for Marlboro cigarettes, reported lower-than-expected quarterly earnings and a decline in revenue. The article highlights that Altria is struggling in the smokeless tobacco market.

feed.title: AbbVie Launches Love in Mind to Spotlight the Emotional Impact of Migraine on Romantic Relationships
feed.summary: AbbVie has launched "Love in Mind," an educational initiative to highlight the emotional impact of migraine on romantic relationships. A Harris Poll survey conducted by AbbVie shows that migraine attacks significantly affect dating and intimacy, with nearly three out of four respondents stating migraine has impacted their romantic relationships. The campaign, supported by country music star Jessie James Decker, encourages open conversations with healthcare providers for comprehensive migraine care.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Viewed Simon Property Group, Inc. (SPG) as In-Line REIT Performer for 2026
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley rates Simon Property Group (SPG) as an "Equal Weight" and expects it to be an "in-line" REIT performer for 2026, forecasting a 15% total return. The firm raised its price target for SPG to $205 from $180 and adjusted its sector preferences to favor apartments, billboards, and data centers. Scotiabank also increased its price target for SPG to $189 from $186, maintaining a "Sector Perform" rating, ahead of the Q4 earnings season for U.S. Real Estate & REITs.

feed.title: Caterpillar Says Higher Tariffs Impacted Profit Margins
feed.summary: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) reported record quarterly and full-year revenue for 2025, driven by an 18% increase in fourth-quarter sales to $19.133 billion and annual revenue reaching $67.6 billion. Despite exceeding revenue and adjusted profit estimates, the company's operating profit margin declined, with management attributing this largely to the impact of higher tariffs and restructuring costs. Caterpillar's CEO expressed confidence for the new year with a strong backlog and focus on long-term value.

feed.title: A Quick Look at Today's Ratings for Synchrony Financial(SYF.US), With a Forecast Between $83 to $100
feed.summary: Several Wall Street analysts have updated their ratings for Synchrony Financial (SYF.US) on January 29, with price targets ranging from $83 to $100. Morgan Stanley and J.P. Morgan maintain "hold" ratings with adjusted price targets, while BofA Securities, Wells Fargo, and TD Cowen maintain "buy" ratings, with Wells Fargo and TD Cowen also maintaining their previous price targets. The article includes a table summarizing the latest ratings and price targets from eight analysts.

feed.title: Eli Lilly, BioAge chase NLRP3 inhibitors with ‘pipeline in a pill’ potential
feed.summary: Both Eli Lilly and BioAge Labs are actively developing NLRP3 inhibitors, recognizing their potential as a "pipeline in a pill" to treat a wide range of inflammation-driven diseases, including cardiovascular, neurodegenerative, and metabolic disorders. Eli Lilly recently acquired Ventyx Biosciences for $1.2 billion for its NLRP3 inhibitor pipeline, while BioAge's oral inhibitor, BGE-102, showed promising results in a Phase 1 study for cardiovascular risk factors and plans to expand into ophthalmology. The early-stage development of these drugs aims to offer more convenient oral treatments to address the significant role of inflammation in chronic illnesses.

feed.title: Kinston marks anniversary of West Pharmaceutical Services explosion
feed.summary: Thursday marks the anniversary of the explosion at the West Pharmaceutical Services plant in Kinston, which occurred on January 29, 2003. The blast killed six employees and caused extensive damage, making it one of eastern North Carolina's deadliest industrial accidents. The community observes this day to remember those who died and acknowledge the ongoing impact on their families, colleagues, and first responders.

feed.title: GD Aerospace full-year revenue grows 16.5%YoY to $13bn
feed.summary: General Dynamics' aerospace segment reported a 16.5% year-over-year revenue increase to $13.1 billion in 2025, driven by strong Gulfstream sales and aftermarket services, despite an initial stock price dip. The company delivered 158 Gulfstream aircraft, a significant rise from 2024, and saw increased demand for its new G700 and G800 models. Looking ahead to 2026, GD Aerospace anticipates further revenue growth to $13.6 billion and an improved operating margin.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Invests $6.84 Million in Bristol Myers Squibb Company $BMY
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP disclosed a new position in Bristol Myers Squibb, purchasing 151,760 shares valued at approximately $6.84 million in the third quarter. Other institutional investors like Tidemark LLC and Mirae Asset Global Investments Co. Ltd. also adjusted their holdings. The article highlights recent analyst ratings, stock performance, and the company's increased quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Is There Still Value In SLB (SLB) After Its Strong Recent Share Price Run?
feed.summary: SLB (formerly Schlumberger) has seen significant share price appreciation recently, with returns of 28.9% over the past month and 23.1% over one year. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests that SLB is currently undervalued by 45.4% based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model, with an intrinsic value of $89.58 per share compared to its recent price of $48.87. However, its P/E ratio of 21.66x is in line with the Energy Services industry and its own Fair Ratio, indicating it is priced appropriately by this metric.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Takes $12.11 Million Position in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. $REGN
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP recently acquired a new position in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) during the third quarter, purchasing 21,540 shares valued at approximately $12.11 million. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investors modifying their holdings in the biopharmaceutical company, which now has 83.31% institutional ownership. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for REGN, with an average price target of $784.77, while company insiders have recently sold shares.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Sells 209,272 Shares of Match Group Inc. $MTCH
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP reduced its stake in Match Group Inc. by 73.2% in the third quarter, selling 209,272 shares, bringing their total holdings to 76,595 shares valued at $2.7 million. This comes as Match Group recently announced a quarterly dividend and its CEO, Spencer M. Rascoff, purchased over 14,000 shares in November. The stock currently holds an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $36.38.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Buys 277,916 Shares of Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP significantly increased its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) by 305.6% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 277,916 shares. The firm now holds 368,848 shares of Merck, valued at approximately $30.96 million, making it the 22nd largest holding in Ruffer LLP's portfolio. Other institutional investors like Charles Schwab Investment Management Inc., DLD Asset Management LP, and Norges Bank also made substantial changes to their positions in MRK.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Takes Position in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. $IFF
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP has acquired a new position in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF), purchasing over 220,000 shares valued at approximately $13.5 million. This move is part of several institutional investors modifying their holdings in IFF, alongside recent analyst reports adjusting price targets and ratings for the specialty chemicals company. IFF's stock performance shows a recent dip, with a market cap of $18.48 billion and analysts predicting a full-year EPS of 4.32.

feed.title: Wright Investors Service Inc. Buys 8,746 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Wright Investors Service Inc. increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 21.2% in the third quarter, now owning 50,064 shares valued at over $12 million. Other institutional investors like Financial Gravity Companies Inc. and CarsonAllaria Wealth Management Ltd. also adjusted their holdings. The article also touches upon recent insider selling, Alphabet's financial performance, and analyst ratings, indicating a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Raises Stake in Gilead Sciences, Inc. $GILD
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP significantly increased its stake in Gilead Sciences, Inc. by 304.3% in the third quarter, now owning 182,343 shares worth $20.24 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the biopharmaceutical company. Meanwhile, insider selling by CFO Andrew D. Dickinson and Johanna Mercier was reported, totaling over 247,000 shares.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Makes New $4.33 Million Investment in T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. $TROW
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP has acquired a new stake of 42,144 shares, valued at approximately $4.33 million, in T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. during the third quarter. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the asset manager. Shares of T. Rowe Price Group opened at $105.25, and analysts have recently provided varied ratings and price targets for the stock.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Sells 3,759,121 Shares of Smurfit Westrock PLC $SW
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP significantly reduced its stake in Smurfit Westrock PLC, selling 3,759,121 shares and decreasing its position by 82.7%. Despite this, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp increased their holdings. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with various target price adjustments.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Has $2.99 Million Stake in Domino's Pizza Inc $DPZ
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC reduced its holdings in Domino's Pizza Inc. by 32.7% during the third quarter, now owning 7,260 shares valued at $2.99 million. Despite this, other hedge funds increased their stakes, and institutional investors collectively own 94.63% of the company's stock. The article also details recent analyst ratings, with an average "Hold" rating and price target of $480.56, and notes a recent insider stock sale.

feed.title: Danaher stock rating reiterated at Overweight by KeyBanc on bioprocess growth
feed.summary: KeyBanc has reiterated an Overweight rating on Danaher (NYSE:DHR) with a $310.00 price target, citing strong bioprocess growth and improving market conditions. The company's fourth-quarter 2025 results showed the fifth consecutive quarter of high-single-digit or better bioprocess growth, along with positive indicators from diagnostics and Life Science end markets. Despite a weaker dollar and conservative first-quarter 2026 guidance, KeyBanc remains confident in Danaher's potential for core growth and future M&A, supported by strong financial health and consistent dividend payments.

feed.title: 70,061 Shares in Artisan Partners Asset Management Inc. $APAM Acquired by Ruffer LLP
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP recently acquired a new stake of 70,061 shares in Artisan Partners Asset Management Inc. (NYSE:APAM), valued at approximately $3.04 million, as per its latest SEC filing. This acquisition represents about 0.09% of Artisan Partners Asset Management's stock. The article also details other institutional investor activity, the company's financial performance including revenue and EPS, and recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods raises Dynex Capital price target to $15.25
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has increased its price target for Dynex Capital (NYSE:DX) to $15.25 from $14.50, maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment is based on a 3-4% year-to-date rise in book value and projected economic returns of approximately 15% for 2026/2027. Dynex Capital recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings and has amended its stock distribution agreement to increase the number of common shares available for sale.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin raises annual profit forecast on aerospace parts demand
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin has increased its annual profit forecast, driven by strong demand for aerospace parts. The company's revised outlook reflects positive performance within this sector.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Purchases 9,217 Shares of Mohawk Industries, Inc. $MHK
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC increased its stake in Mohawk Industries, Inc. (NYSE:MHK) by 61.3% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 9,217 shares to own a total of 24,248 shares valued at $2,972,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the company. Mohawk Industries saw its stock open at $119.66, with a market capitalization of $7.40 billion, while analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $133.83.

feed.title: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) Raised to Strong-Buy at Hsbc Global Res
feed.summary: HSBC Global Res has upgraded KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating, setting a $144 price target. This upgrade comes as KKR recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with $1.41 EPS and $4.36 billion in revenue. The overall analyst consensus for KKR is a "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $156.57, despite mixed ratings from various firms.

feed.title: Zacks Research Downgrades Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) to Strong Sell
feed.summary: Zacks Research has downgraded Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) from a "hold" to a "strong sell" rating. Despite beating quarterly EPS expectations, the company missed revenue estimates and issued cautious FY2026 guidance. The stock currently trades around $136.72, and analyst coverage remains mixed with a consensus "Hold" rating and price target of $156.60.

feed.title: Assessing Emerson Electric (EMR) Valuation After Oppenheimer Downgrade And Cautious Growth Outlook
feed.summary: Oppenheimer downgraded Emerson Electric (EMR) from Outperform to Perform, citing that the company's valuation already reflects anticipated growth, limiting near-term upside. Despite trading near Oppenheimer's valuation range, Emerson Electric shows an intrinsic discount and a small gap to the average price target, prompting questions about whether it presents a buying opportunity or if future growth is fully priced in. The company is poised for revenue expansion due to accelerating digital automation and AI adoption in industrial markets, along with large-scale investments in power generation, LNG, and life sciences.

feed.title: Take Two Balances Zynga Cash Flows With Grand Theft Auto VI Upside
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive is balancing its business model with recurring revenue from its Zynga mobile games and the anticipated upside from upcoming console and PC titles like Grand Theft Auto VI. This dual-engine approach, blending steady mobile cash flow with hit-driven console releases, aims to provide greater earnings stability and allow for strategic delays in major game launches without significant financial pressure. The company's recent shares closed at $243.18, showing a 27.9% increase over the past year.

feed.title: Ruffer LLP Decreases Stock Position in Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company $HPE
feed.summary: Ruffer LLP significantly reduced its holdings in Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company ($HPE) by 62.7% during the third quarter, selling 276,229 shares and holding 164,531 shares valued at $4.04 million. Other institutional investors showed mixed activity, with some increasing and others decreasing their stakes. Hewlett Packard Enterprise recently increased its quarterly dividend and received various analyst ratings, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $25.53.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Adjusts C.H. Robinson Worldwide Price Target to $200 From $180, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has increased its price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) to $200, up from the previous $180, while reaffirming its Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the analyst firm on the transportation and logistics company. The article also notes Morgan Stanley's differing view, raising its target but keeping an Underweight rating.

feed.title: Direxion Daily BRKB Bull 2X Shares (NASDAQ:BRKU) Sees Large Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: Direxion Daily BRKB Bull 2X Shares (NASDAQ:BRKU) experienced a significant increase in short interest, rising by 129.0% to 390,272 shares as of January 15th. This represents a short-interest ratio of 2.1 days and means approximately 14.7% of the company's stock is short sold. Additionally, the article notes that institutional investor Optiver Holding B.V. recently acquired a new position in BRKU, and the company increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Hospitals Named on America’s 50 Best Hospitals List for 2026 by Healthgrades
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare announced that three of its hospitals were named among America's 50 Best Hospitals and 15 among America's 100 Best Hospitals by Healthgrades for 2026. This recognition signifies superior performance in patient care across multiple specialties, with Mission Hospital, HCA HealthONE Sky Ridge, and HCA Florida Kendall Hospital achieving top 1% status. In total, 44 HCA Healthcare hospitals were recognized on Healthgrades' America's 250 Best Hospitals list.

feed.title: Meridian Health Plan of Illinois and Centene Foundation Award $2.2 Million Grant to Safer Foundation for Purchase and Renovation of Affordable Housing Building in Chicago – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Meridian Health Plan of Illinois and the Centene Foundation have awarded a $2.2 million grant to Safer Foundation to buy and renovate an apartment building in Chicago's South Austin neighborhood. This grant will help Safer Foundation provide 23 affordable rental units, including some designated for justice-involved individuals, to address the growing homelessness crisis in Chicago. The initiative aims to offer stable housing and support services to foster long-term stability and self-sufficiency for underserved individuals and families.

feed.title: Freedom Capital Raised Prologis, Inc. (PLD)’s Target to $138, Cites Portfolio Strength Despite Downgrade
feed.summary: Freedom Capital Markets has raised its price target for Prologis, Inc. (PLD) to $138 from $134, despite downgrading the stock from Buy to Hold due to valuation concerns. The firm noted that PLD's Q4 report highlighted the quality of its portfolio and the robustness of its business model amidst a stabilizing industrial real estate market. Separately, BMO Capital Markets also increased its price target for PLD to $123, citing improved near-term earnings and strong institutional support, while acknowledging the stock trades at a premium to its peers.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern tops operating ratio expectations amid the challenging backdrop (NSC:NYSE)
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation slightly exceeded operating ratio expectations despite a challenging fourth quarter. The company reported a 2% year-over-year decrease in railway operating revenue to $3.0B, accompanied by a 4% decline in volume. NSC's shares showed a modest gain in premarket trading following the earnings release.

feed.title: From Fidelity to Solana: Hadley Stern joins DeFi Development’s board
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp. (DFDV) has appointed Hadley Stern to its Board of Directors, leveraging his extensive institutional experience in digital assets, blockchain infrastructure, and custody, particularly with Solana. Stern's background includes roles at Fidelity, Bloq, AWS Innovation Lab, Marinade Labs, and The Bank of New York Mellon, where he launched a bank-grade digital asset custody platform. This appointment aims to strengthen DFDV's Solana-focused treasury strategy and enhance its engagement with sophisticated investors and partners in the accelerating institutional interest in Solana and onchain yield.

feed.title: DeFi Development Corp. Appoints Hadley Stern to Board of Directors
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) has appointed Hadley Stern to its Board of Directors, recognizing his extensive experience in digital assets, blockchain, and institutional finance. Stern, known for his work at Fidelity Labs, Bloq, AWS, Marinade Labs, and BNY Mellon, will contribute his expertise as DFDV expands its Solana-focused treasury strategy. Both Stern and CEO Joseph Onorati believe his background will be crucial for the company's growth and engagement with sophisticated investors in the evolving digital asset landscape.

feed.title: Freedom Capital Boosts BlackRock, Inc. (BLK) Target Amid Strong Earnings Potential
feed.summary: Freedom Capital's analyst, Mikhail Paramonov, upgraded BlackRock, Inc. (BLK) from Hold to Buy, increasing its price target to $1,364, citing strong Q4 results and long-term earnings potential from various revenue streams. BlackRock also recently filed to launch the iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF, aiming to provide bitcoin exposure with an income-generating covered-call strategy. Despite the positive outlook for BLK, the article suggests that some AI stocks might offer greater returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lowered Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) Target to $171 And Maintained Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley reduced its price target for Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) to $171 from $183, while maintaining an Overweight rating, citing updated oil price assumptions for 2026-2027 and expectations of weaker cash flow despite solid fourth-quarter operations. Mizuho also slightly lowered its price target for FANG to $194 ahead of the company's Q4 earnings report. Diamondback Energy is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on unconventional resources in the Permian Basin.

feed.title: Strategic Advisors LLC Invests $1.02 Million in Lowe's Companies, Inc. $LOW
feed.summary: Strategic Advisors LLC acquired 4,042 shares of Lowe's Companies, Inc., valued at approximately $1.02 million, during the third quarter, bringing institutional ownership of the stock to 74.06%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $283.65, while the company reported strong Q3 earnings of $3.06 EPS, a quarterly dividend of $1.20, and CEO Marvin Ellison sold 18,000 shares.

feed.title: Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS Shares Purchased by Strategic Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Strategic Advisors LLC increased its stake in Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 76.3% in the third quarter, now holding 7,578 shares valued at $3.74 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, contributing to hedge funds and institutional investors owning 85.47% of the stock. Synopsys recently beat EPS expectations, with revenue up 37.8% year-over-year, and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $553.57.

feed.title: L3Harris quarterly revenue misses estimates on government shutdown pressures
feed.summary: Defense contractor L3Harris Technologies missed Wall Street estimates for fourth-quarter revenue due to a prolonged U.S. government shutdown delaying contract awards and impacting its space systems business. The company's total revenue for Q4 was $5.65 billion, below estimates, and it faces potential revenue pressure from the sale of a majority stake in its space technology business. Additionally, a new partnership with the Department of War introduces a potential conflict of interest as the government holds an equity stake in the contractor's rocket motor business.

feed.title: Customers push back on Xcel power shutoffs during Public Utilities Commission feedback session Wednesday
feed.summary: Community members, business owners, and city leaders expressed frustration during a Public Utilities Commission (PUC) feedback session regarding Xcel Energy's recent power shutoffs. While acknowledging the need for wildfire mitigation, customers argued that power shutoffs cannot be the only solution and highlighted significant financial losses and personal hardship. The PUC plans to develop new rules for utility companies by the end of the year based on this feedback.
